name: Suspicious Valid Accounts Logon
notes: This rule triggers when a suspicious login from a valid account is detected.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Account Tampering - Suspicious Failed Logon Reasons
BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Remote Logon with Explicit Credentials
BB:BehaviorDefinition: User Added to Local Administrators
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Remote Logon with Explicit Credentials, BB:BehaviorDefinition: User Added to Local Administrators, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Account Tampering - Suspicious Failed Logon Reasons
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious Valid Accounts Logon on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Remote Logon with Explicit Credentials, BB:BehaviorDefinition: User Added to Local Administrators, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Account Tampering - Suspicious Failed Logon Reasons
RED_list: Event name: Suspicious Valid Accounts Logon
Event description: Detects when a suspicious login from a valid account is detected.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
